rulings.Case Title: LIZA SWIFT VS. LARRY SWIFT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Renewed Notice Of Motion, And Motion, To Substitute Plaintiff Janesta Downey, Trustee Of The Liza Denise Swift Living Trust, In Place Of Deceased Plaintiff Liza Swift

PLAINTIFF LIZA SWIFT's Motion To Substitute Plaintiff Janesta Downey, Trustee Of The Liza Denise Swift Living Trust, In Place Of Deceased Plaintiff Liza Swift continued to June 22, 2020 on Court's own motion. = (501/CFH)
